channel.title: Conditional Access on considerITman
channel.description: Recent content in Conditional Access on considerITman

item.title: Complete Guide: Conditional Access Policies in Entra ID
item.description: Step-by-step guide to Conditional Access in Microsoft Entra ID. Covers policy anatomy, grant controls, sign-in risk, user risk, and safe rollout for E3 and E5.

item.title: Conditional Access Best Practices in Microsoft 365 (2025 Deployment Guide)
item.description: Conditional Access deployment guide for M365: block legacy auth, enforce phishing-resistant MFA, add E5 risk policies. MFA stops 99.9% of compromised sign-ins.
